title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.715 - Penalty for violations
text:
351.715.  Penalty for violations. — For violation of any provisions of this chapter for which no other penalty is provided, the person violating shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor and upon conviction punished as provided in section 351.720.
(RSMo 1939 § 5109, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 131) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4637; 1919 § 9831
